examples: All these actions, singly and in combination, are part of the tested and true armamentarium of science.
Moreover, more investment in the media armamentarium and technology are needed, as well as training a host of professionals in media.
Fortunately, therapeutic paradigms are shifting, and clinicians have many new agents in their armamentarium for combating fungal infection.
Because so many other countries limit access to many of the newest drugs, U.S. doctors have perhaps the best and most complete armamentarium for fighting cancer.
Why the reluctance to incorporate this therapy into our armamentarium?
